creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Portubgrade of xfce4-weather-plugin rises this error:


libtool: link: cannot find the library `/usr/local/lib/libxcb-aux.la' or unhandled argument `/usr/local/lib/libxcb-aux.la'
gmake[2]: *** [xfce4-weather-plugin] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/misc/xfce4-weather-plugin/work/xfce4-weather-plugin-0.7.4/panel-plugin'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/misc/xfce4-weather-plugin/work/xfce4-weather-plugin-0.7.4'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/misc/xfce4-weather-plugin.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20111216-26301-j6r5vg-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=xfce4-weather-plugin-0.7.4 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=0.7.4 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! misc/xfce4-weather-plugin (xfce4-weather-plugin-0.7.4)        (unknown build error)

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/misc/xfce4-weather-plugin
make install


or

portupgrade xfce4-weather-plugin

because: 
xfce4-weather-plugin-0.7.4          <   needs updating (port has 0.7.4_1)
